requirements.description: The bot should acknowledge receiving the image
The bot should attempt to describe or reference the image content
The bot should continue the conversation naturally after receiving the media
The conversation should not crash or produce errors when media is sent

transcript.content: Hey! I'm Alex 👋 Can you help me book an appointment based on what you see in this image?

error: Bot returned 502: {"error":"LLM request failed: Could not process image"}
